_readme: Golden fixture for Route Health (P1, route-intelligence-design_2026-07-09). Consumed by backend/tests/test_route_health.py. Python is the ONLY implementation (JS displays stored rows); if a JS preview computation is ever added, this fixture becomes its parity contract. matrix node 0 = depot, nodes 1..n = tasks in array order. Times are HH:MM. solver = the solve_route_v2 result for the same day ({ordered: task indices, legs: drive-min per ordered stop, dropped}). expect pins score/partial/finding types/selected components exactly.

cases.name: perfect_day
cases.why: actual order == solver order, no waits/windows/overtime -> 100

cases.name: backtrack_and_excess
cases.why: actual A(40),C(10),B(25): one far_to_near up-jump (8 pts) + 20 excess drive min (30 pts) -> 62; reorder finding fires (saving 20 >= 10)

cases.name: idle_gap
cases.why: B scheduled 40 min after reachable arrival (>15 free) -> 40 idle min = 8 pts -> 92

cases.name: lateness_risk
cases.why: ARRIVAL-window semantics: C sched 11:15 inside its 09:00-11:30 window, but physics (A 90min + B 60min services) puts arrival/start at 11:45 > 11:30 window end -> 15 pts -> 85

cases.name: window_violation
cases.why: ARRIVAL-window semantics: C scheduled 10:15, AFTER its 09:00-10:00 arrival window ends -> the plan itself breaks the promise (20 pts, lateness NOT double-counted) -> 80. Starting late-but-inside the window (e.g. 09:34 in 07-10) is NOT a violation — Israel replay 2026-07-09.

cases.name: overtime
cases.why: work end 10:30, last service ends 10:45 -> 15 min over = 10 base + 15 = 25 pts -> 75

cases.name: empty_day
cases.why: nothing to audit -> score null (chip hidden), not a fake 100

cases.name: partial_unscheduled
cases.why: C has no scheduled_time -> audit covers A,B only; solver total (3 stops) not comparable -> excess skipped, partial=true, clean subset scores 100

cases.name: solver_dropped_skips_excess
cases.why: solver dropped a stop -> route totals not comparable -> excess skipped + partial, other components still audited

cases.name: backtrack_cap_via_weights
cases.why: weights override: cap 10 < 2 violations x 8; nearest-first-ish actual under far_to_near strategy; actual drive 50 < solver 75 -> excess clamps to 0 -> 90

cases.name: flexible_ignores_zigzag
cases.why: same actual order as backtrack_and_excess but strategy flexible -> no backtrack component; excess drive still costs 30 pts -> 70

cases.name: solver_endorsed_zigzag_not_flagged
cases.why: actual order C,A,B has an up-jump (10->40) BUT it equals the solver's own best order (windows forced it) -> backtrack suppressed, excess 0 -> 100

cases.name: break_overlap_not_idle
cases.why: B waits 30 min but 10 of them overlap the 09:10-09:40 break -> counted idle 20 (>15 free) = 4 pts -> 96
